Name: Azure Function - Set AppSettings from Azure AppConfig
Description:
This step retrieves one or more key/values from an Azure App Configuration store and adds them to an Azure App Function's AppSettings.

You can retrieve individual keys that match a specific name, and you can choose a custom setting name for each key.

Wildcard search is also supported using the `*` notation in the **Key Names** parameter. Note: Combining a wildcard search with custom setting names is not supported.

You can also combine retrieved values with additional parameters passed into the step using the `Additional AppSettings` parameter.

Authentication is performed using an Azure Service Principal.

---

**Required:** 
- An Azure account with permission to both retrieve values from the Azure App Config store and publish to the App Function.
- The `az` CLI on the target or worker. If the CLI can't be found, the step will fail. 

Notes:

- Tested on Octopus `2024.1` using az version `2.38.0`
- Tested with both Windows PowerShell and PowerShell Core (on Linux).
- Slot Settings are not currently supported.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.AzureAccount
Parameters.Label: Azure Account
Parameters.HelpText: An Azure account with permission to both retrieve values from the Azure App Config store and publish to the App Function

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.ConfigStoreName
Parameters.Label: Config Store Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the Azure App Configuration store. Provide this or the **Config store endpoint**.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.ConfigStoreEndpoint
Parameters.Label: Config Store Endpoint
Parameters.HelpText: The endpoint for the Azure App Configuration Store. Provide this or the **Config store name**.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.RetrievalMethod
Parameters.Label: Retrieval Method
Parameters.HelpText:
Choose how the step calls the az cli. Either:
- `All`: Retrieve all configuration values in one call
- `Individually`: Retrieve configuration values in multiple calls; one for each key specified in the **Key Names** parameter.

Default: `All`

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.KeyNames
Parameters.Label: Key Names
Parameters.HelpText:
Specify the names of the keys to be returned from Azure App Configuration in the format `KeyName | CustomSettingName` where:

- `KeyName` is the key to retrieve. Wildcards are supported by adding `*` at the end of the key name.
- `CustomSettingName` is the _optional_ name to set for the AppSetting value in the App Function. *If this value isn't specified, the original key will be used.*.

**Note:** Multiple keys can be retrieved by entering each one on a new line. Note: Combining a wildcard search with custom setting names is not supported.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.Labels
Parameters.Label: Labels
Parameters.HelpText:
Labels are an attribute on keys. Provide one or more labels in the format `label1,label2` to retrieve only selected keys tagged with those labels.

**Note:** You can include both label values *and* specify key names if you want.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.SuppressWarnings
Parameters.Label: Suppress warnings
Parameters.HelpText: Suppress warnings from being written to the task log. For example, when a supplied key can't be found in the Azure App Configuration store.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.TreatWarningsAsErrors
Parameters.Label: Treat Warnings as Errors
Parameters.HelpText: Treats warnings as errors. If enabled the **Suppress Warnings** parameter is ignored.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.FunctionName
Parameters.Label: Azure Function App Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the Azure App function.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.ResourceGroup
Parameters.Label: Resource Group
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the resource group where the Function App is located.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.Slot
Parameters.Label: Slot
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the slot. Defaults to the production slot if not specified.

Parameters.Name: AzFunction.SetAppSettings.FromAzAppConfig.AdditionalSettingsValues
Parameters.Label: Additional AppSettings
Parameters.HelpText:
Specify the name and values of any **additional** settings to be applied to the Azure App Function in the format `KEY | VALUE` where:

- `KEY` is the name of the app setting to add
- `VALUE` is the value to be used. [Octopus variables](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables) can be used here.


**Note:** Multiple settings can be added by entering each one on a new line. As a result, values that span multiple lines will result in an error.
